data.body:
OVERLAY CATALOG — security (reference overlay)
- Source: Anthropic claude-code-security-review (MIT) — 10-category vuln taxonomy + exploit_scenario + confidence gate (>0.8). Attribute MIT.
- Triggers: auth/authz/crypto/session paths; files touching secrets, input handling, deserialization, SQL/command construction, network/CORS config (reuse catalog applies_to globs).
- Scanner pre-pass: optional Semgrep/Gitleaks/Trivy-secrets as ground truth (LLM-as-judge over findings).
- Base-escalation: any security-shaped concern even without a trigger match.
- Severity: hard auto-block reserved for High/Critical + secrets; else advisory.
